name: Kokoro Anzai
description: She is a 1st year middle school student. ~! It is later revealed she is from 2006. !~

name: Kouichirou Iketani

name: Kouko Nosa
description: **Height:** 155 cm (5'1") Secretary of the destroyer-class ship, Harekaze.

name: Kurimu Sakurano
description: __Height:__ 148 cm Kurimu is a senior in Hekiyou Academy, and is the president of the student council. She is well-liked by most of the other students. She is the cause of most of Ken's labor and why he became a eroge mania. Kurimu and Ken met in the spring when she was Vice President at the time, Ken decided to help her carry boxes. He asked for her help in becoming a better person, and Kurimu suggested playing a dating sim game as she said that the main character's job is to make everyone happ

name: Lie Ren
description: __Race:__ Human __Weapons:__ StormFlower, Father's Dagger __Height:__ 175 cm Lie Ren, more commonly referred to by his last name Ren, is a former student at Beacon Academy, a member of Team RNJR and one of the remaining members of Team JNPR. His weapons of choice are a pair of green, fully automatic pistols with sickle-like blades attached vertically under the barrels, named StormFlower.

name: Lily Baker
description: A 13-year-old girl who moved to Japan from England. She likes playing at the game center, but she still lacks certain gaming skills. (Source: Anime News Network, edited)
mediaTitles: Cultural Exchange with a Game Centre Girl
searchTerms: Cultural Exchange with a Game Centre Girl

name: Lionel Messi
description: Lionel Andrés Messi, also known as Leo Messi, is an Argentine professional footballer.

name: Lucas
description: He was raised by a band of mercenaries, where he served as their bugler. After being saved by the Pontiff, he agrees to become the leader of the Papal States' branch-hexed, in exchange for help in achieving his dream of becoming a maestro. His power allows him to turn sound into light, which he uses in battle to command troops.
mediaTitles: The Bugle Call: Song of War
searchTerms: The Bugle Call: Song of War

name: Masami Kugimiya
description: Masami is a gentleman with an elegant height. He still styles his hair the same way he used to as a child, wavy, long bangs, short at the back, and shaved on the sides. He tends to pull it all backwards, or pull only one side of it depending on occasion, but lets it down to his face when he's at home or inside. He wears graceful suits usually with suspenders, and Derby or Oxford shoes of some sort professionally, but tasteful and fashionable in his day to day life; scarfs, boots, cloaks, ragged

name: Masotan
description: __Pilot:__ Hisone Amakasu Hisone's OTF Dragon (Source: Hisomaso Official Site)

name: Megumi Chihaya
description: A social service employee who is actually working as a temporary employee with a shorter shift than others. She is rather aloof towards her co-workers, and is revealed to be an avid fan of the magical girl series Magical Flowers. When she is not at work, she attends cosplay events dressed as Gerbera Pink, one of the characters of the series. She openly desires to see Lucy cosplay as one of the other characters from "Magical Flowers" due to her dark hair and large bust. She hates Hasebe getting t

name: Melissa Moretti
description: Melissa Moretti is the youngest Moretti sibling and a civilian. She does not believe in the occult and is unaware of her brother Klein's activity as a Beyonder and Nighthawk. She loves her two brothers both very much and tries hard to save money.

name: Mewi Freya

name: Miho Amakata
description: Haruka and Makoto's homeroom teacher and classic literature teacher. She seems to have been an office lady in Tokyo in the past, but no one knows the details. She utters the words of great figures from ages past. Due to her personality, when she asks something of someone, they can't refuse. (Source: ANN)

name: Misaki Fujioka
description: Mei's cousin. ~!Mei and her are twins at birth, but due to circumstances, one was adopted.!~

name: Misako Kurata
description: Misako is Sana's mother. She is an award-winning author and a single mom. The peculiar thing about Misako is that she wears elaborate hats tailored as playgrounds for her pet chipmunk, Maro, to live in. These hats incorporate everything from a moving Ferris Wheel to a small tree.

name: Neko Kamimoku
description: Class 1-3, student number 4. She always looks sleepy and often dozes off in class, which the teacher often cautions her about. (Source: Official Site, Translated)

name: Nene Romanova
description: Nene Romanova is a member of the Knight Sabers, acting as a technical conductor and hacker, and is an employee of the AD Police, functioning as the Knight Saber's mole in the ADP world. She is bubbly, naive, has an affinity for candy and junk food, and is blissfully inept with real world logic. Due to her lack of (and unwillingness to engage in) regular exercise, she is often teased by Priss and Linna for not being more physically durable. Nene's purple and pink Hard Suit's offensive weapon is a

name: Noel
description: Noel is the Mermaid Princess of the Arctic Ocean, and the keeper of the Deep Blue Pearl. She has three different forms: Mermaid Noel, Human Noel, and her singer form, Deep Blue Pearl Voice. She has no image song. Noel is portrayed as the smart and quiet type, but she is involved in most of the second trio's crazy things. Noel is not one who makes a decision without thinking, but she is willing to sacrifice herself if it means saving her friends. She was captured by Gaito, and so she only appeare
mediaTitles: Mermaid Melody: Pichi Pichi Pitch Pure
searchTerms: Mermaid Melody: Pichi Pichi Pitch Pure

name: Norihiko Yokoya
description: __Occupation:__ Ex-Coporate CEO (Drama) __Abilities:__ Manipulation, Bribery, Intimidation Yokoya Norihiko is the current main antagonist of the series, introduced in the Third Round's Northern Country. He is a calm, darked-haired man who is fond of carrying mice on his person. Nearco accurately describes him as Akiyama's greatest rival, and Nao senses something odd about him early in the game.

name: Olivier
description: __Race:__ Elf Olivier is one of the three heroes that managed to defeat the demon Diabolos. As a result, her descendants were cursed by the demon. (Source: To Be a Power in the Shadows! Wiki)

name: Oriana Elsha
nativeName: オリアナ エルシャ
description: **Height:** 157cm Oriana is Vincent’s girlfriend and a merchant’s daughter. She attends the renowned Lagen Magic Academy, where she studies alongside him.
